zh.Leeds, Metropolitan Borough of Leeds, We: 英國英格蘭肯特利德斯
zh.Leeds, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾利德斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Langton III於大約1363年出生在英國越可爾法爾利時，他的父親John Langton32歲，母親Beatrice Meaux25歲。他和Joan Neville至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1400年在英國英格蘭越可爾利德斯享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特利德斯。

zh-hans.Leeds, Metropolitan Borough of Leeds, We: 英国英格兰肯特利德斯
zh-hans.Leeds, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾利德斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Langton III于大约1363年出生在英国越可爾法爾利时，他的父亲John Langton32岁，母亲Beatrice Meaux25岁。他和Joan Neville至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1400年在英国英格兰越可爾利德斯享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特利德斯。

nameMeanings.name: Langton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, such as Langton Hall in Kirkby in Ashfield (Nottinghamshire), Langton Lodge in Hendon (Middlesex), Langton (Yorkshire), East and West Langton (Leicestershire), Langton by Horncastle, Langton by Spilsby, and Langton by Wragby (all in Lincolnshire), and Lanton (Northumb). Compare Lankton , Lanton , and Longton .

variants.name: Lankton
meanings: History: Thomas Lankton, born c. 1714 in Hartford County, CT, died 1783 in Litchfield County, CT, was a son of Joseph Langton.

variants.name: Longton
meanings: habitational name from Longton in Lancashire. The placename derives from Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Langton III was born about 1363, in Farnley, Yorkshire, England, his father, John Langton, was 32 and his mother, Beatrice Meaux, was 25. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Joan Neville. He died in 1400, in Leeds, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in Leeds, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Langton III est né environ 1363, à Farnley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Langton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Meaux, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Joan Neville. Il est décédé en 1400, à Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Leeds, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Langton III um 1363 in Farnley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Langton 32 und seine Mutter Beatrice Meaux 25. Er hatte mit Joan Neville mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1400 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Leeds, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Leeds, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Langton III è nato il circa 1363 nel Farnley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, John Langton, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice Meaux, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Joan Neville. Morì nel 1400, nel Leeds, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Leeds, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Leeds, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリーズ
ja.lifeSummary: John Langton IIIが約1363年にイギリスヨークシュアイアファルンリーで生まれた時，父John Langtonは32歳，母Beatrice Meauxは25歳であった。彼はJoan Nevilleとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1400年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリーズで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントリーズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Langton III(이)가 대략 1363년 영국 요르크실르 패른리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Langton(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice Meaux(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Joan Neville(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리드즈에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 리드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Langton III nasceu aproximadamente 1363, em Farnley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Langton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Meaux, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Joan Neville. Ele faleceu em 1400, em Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Leeds, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Langton III родился около 1363 г. в местности фарнли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Langton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Meaux, 25. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Joan Neville. Он умер в 1400 г. в местности лидс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности лидс, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Langton III nació aproximadamente 1363, en Farnley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Langton, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Beatrice Meaux, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Joan Neville. Murió en 1400, en Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Leeds, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
